channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Team USA Won Gold and the Media Can't Stand It
Newsom ripped over 'racist' viral clip telling Black mayor 'I'm like you' before touting poor SAT score
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom is facing heat after telling a Black mayor he is "like you" before describing his poor SAT score and trouble reading spee...

item.title: Morning Minute: Won't You Fly High, Free Bird?
State Dept orders evacuation of non-emergency US personnel from embassy in Beirut
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration ordered non-essential personnel to evacuate the U.S. Embassy in Beirut, Lebanon, on Monday.

item.title: Democrats name candidates to 'Red to Blue' initiative, aiming to flip GOP majority during midterms
item.description: The DCCC announced candidates it is backing as part of its “Red to Blue" initiative as they seek to clinch the House majority during the midterm elect...

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Kash Patel’s Hockey Locker Room Moment Says More About His Critics Than About Him
Federal judge blocks release of Jack Smith report's second volume
item.description: The judge’s ruling blocks the release of Jack Smith’s report on President Donald Trump’s handling of classified documents. The report was slated for p...

item.title: Gavin Newsom Steps in It Again As His GA Remarks Go Viral and He's Accused of Racism
NYC Mayor Mamdani Breaks 86-Year Tradition, Freezes Out Catholic Clergy — Dolan Is ‘Ticked Off’
Family of Iowa grad killed by illegal immigrant to attend Trump's State of the Union
item.description: Sarah Root’s family will attend President Trump’s State of the Union after his administration extradited the illegal immigrant convicted in her 2016 d...
